titleStmt.title: SII 9.689: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 689. (A.R. No. 721 of 1917.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF A MANDAPA TO THE SOUTH-WEST OF RATNAGIRI, MADAKSIRA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and the date is lost. It refers itself to the reign of Śrīraṅgadēva-Mahārāya [ruling at Penugoṇḍe-durga and records the gift of Bhuṭṭēnahaḷḷi, surnamed Raṅgāpura, in Ratnagiri-sthala, situated in Agaḷi-sīme, a subdivision of Rāyadurga-rājya, to Bhadrappadēva, son of Kachchuṭadadēva and grandson of Nambiyaṇṇadēva of Nāgarabāvi, who belonged to Ātrēya-gōtra and Āśvalāyana-sūtra by the Mahānāyakāchārya Raṅgappa-Nāyaka, son of Lakshmīpati-Nāyaka and grandson of Hariti-Duṇḍapa-Nāyaka of Yanumala family and of Vālmika (Vālmīki)-gōtra and disciple of Bhadrappadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
very badly damaged
treya puṇyakāladalu śrīmadrājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīraṁgadēvama
hārāyaru penugūṁḍeya durgadalli ratnasiṁ
hāsanarūḍharāgi pruthvīrājyaṁgaiuttiralu Ātrē
yagōtrada Āślayanasūtrada śrīma(ṁ)nmahāpū
rvācāryyarāda nāgarabāviya naṁbiyaṁṇa
dēvara makkaḷu kaccuṭadēvaru kacoṭadadēvara
makkaḷu bhadrappadēvarige sisyaru makkaḷāda śrīma
nmahānāyakācāryya bhāśege tappuva nā
yakara gaṁḍa marre hokkare kāva yanumala
vaṁśada vāmlikāgōtrada haritiya duṁḍappa
nāyakara komara lakṣmīpatināyakara ko
māra raṁgappanāyakarū tamage pu(ṁ)ṇya
vāgabēkeṁdū rāyadurggada rājyake saluva A
gaḷiya sīmevoḷagaṇa ratnagiriya staḷadoḷa
gaṇa bhuṭṭēnahaḷḷige pratināmavāda raṁgā
pura yeṁbā hesarali yidake saluva gade bedalu ka
ṭṭe kere kāluve yēta kapūle gūḍe guyalu ja
la pasaṇa nidhi nikṣāpa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi sidha sā
dhyaṁgaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyavanū
putrapāraṁpareĀgi caṁdrārkkastāyiga
ḷāgi sarvamānyadalu Anubhavisi yeṁdu koṭṭa
puravārggada silasāsāna .
Digital edition of SII 9.689 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
